metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Southlab AI — productivity tools, freelance automation, desktop vision, and multi-agent systems

plugins.name: upwork-scraper
plugins.description: Scrape Upwork jobs, analyze market demand, write proposals, evaluate postings, optimize rates, review profiles, and design portfolio projects. Includes 5 slash commands and 5 specialized AI agents.

plugins.name: the-council
plugins.description: Catch blind spots in architecture decisions with multi-perspective analysis that learns from your project history. 4 auto-routed modes, configurable roles (including value-analyst), /council:build pipeline, /council:value for value-realization analysis, memory attribution, progressive feature hints, and intelligent memory retrieval with synonym expansion, staleness markers, and MEMORY LENS directives.

plugins.name: computer-vision
plugins.description: Desktop computer vision and input control for Claude Code on Windows. 28 tools: screenshots, click, drag-and-drop, type, scroll, OCR, element finder, text extraction, UI accessibility trees, action routing with adapters, and 9 sandbox tools for parallel desktop automation (Claude automates apps in isolated Windows Sandbox while the user works undisturbed). Like Claude-in-Chrome, but for any Windows app.
